catalysts.thesis: Arvinas received an accelerated FDA Fast Track designation on April 30th with heavy insider accumulation, entirely missed by the market due to mega-cap earnings noise.
catalysts.catalyst_details: FDA granted Fast Track review for vepdegestrant on 2026-04-30. CMO executed a $1.5M open-market buy on 2026-05-01.
catalysts.absorption_status: Ignored by the market due to the distraction of mega-cap tech earnings. Stock is currently down 0.5% today.
catalysts.prediction_market: 80% implied probability of FDA approval in the upcoming PDUFA based on options flow.
catalysts.recency_proof: FDA Fast Track PR published 2026-04-30; Form 4 filed 2026-05-01.
catalysts.risk: Regulatory delays or unexpected safety signals in the open-label extension.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Options market is pricing in historically low IV for a biotech with a near-term FDA catalyst.

catalysts.thesis: Shift4 delivered a massive Q1 earnings surprise with a 30% EPS beat on April 29th, coupled with aggressive insider buying, yet the stock remains flat due to macro payment sector fears.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Q1 2026 Earnings reported on 2026-04-29. EPS of $0.85 beat consensus of $0.65. CEO bought $2M in shares on the open market on 2026-04-30.
catalysts.absorption_status: Unpriced. Stock is up only 1.5% today. Market is ignoring micro fundamental strength due to macro inflation fears.
catalysts.prediction_market: 75% probability of upward analyst revisions by next week.
catalysts.recency_proof: Q1 Earnings PR released 2026-04-29; Insider Form 4 filed 2026-04-30.
catalysts.risk: Broader consumer spending slowdown could compress payment multiples.
catalysts.expected_upside: 15-20% as analysts revise price targets upward.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Forward P/E dropped to 14x despite a 25% upward revision in FY26 guidance.
catalysts.x_sentiment: High retail skepticism, low institutional chatter.
